CREATE TABLE test_table (a Int32, b Int32);
SELECT isConstant(ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT a FROM test_table));
SELECT isConstant((SELECT AVG(b) FROM test_table WHERE a > 0));
CREATE TABLE numbers_table (num UInt32) ENGINE = Memory AS SELECT number FROM numbers(10);
SELECT isConstant((SELECT MAX(num) + MIN(num) FROM numbers_table));
WITH (SELECT 42 AS answer) AS derived SELECT isConstant(answer);
SELECT isConstant((SELECT count() FROM test_table WHERE a = 1) + 1);
